# PERF-133 negative: hoist sort.Slice out of the loop
lang: go
file: PERF-133-safe.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import "sort"

func TopK(buckets [][]int, k int) [][]int {
	for i := range buckets {
		SortDesc(buckets[i])
		if len(buckets[i]) > k {
			buckets[i] = buckets[i][:k]
		}
	}
	return buckets
}

func SortDesc(xs []int) {
	sort.Sort(sort.Reverse(sort.IntSlice(xs)))
}
